title: Launch supervised: human approval before every send in PH-1.
decision: Launch supervised: human approval before every send in PH-1.
rationale: Safety before speed; no accuracy evidence yet.

title: Ground all drafts in retrieved context with citation-or-defer.
decision: Ground all drafts in retrieved context with citation-or-defer.

title: Run the agent in a bounded loop with a tool allow-list and a cost/iteration cap.
decision: Run the agent in a bounded loop with a tool allow-list and a cost/iteration cap.

title: Adopt confidence-based routing and gated auto-send for whitelisted low-risk categories.
decision: Adopt confidence-based routing and gated auto-send for whitelisted low-risk categories.
rationale: Depends on calibration; thresholds not yet known.

title: Defer the choice of agent-orchestration pattern (single-pass vs multi-step planner) until the bounded-loop POC reports.
decision: Defer the choice of agent-orchestration pattern (single-pass vs multi-step planner) until the bounded-loop POC reports.
rationale: Avoid premature architecture; the seam (`ADR-0003`) is fixed, the internal pattern is not.

title: Keep auto-send (`FR-008`) out of PH-1 scope.
decision: Keep auto-send (`FR-008`) out of PH-1 scope.
rationale: Gated on `DEC-004`/`EXP-001`; including it now would violate the supervised-launch constraint (`CON-001`).
